channel.title: Know Parenting — Course 02
channel.description: Know Parenting is the gentle audio guide for tired, loving parents of children aged 0–8. Host Ruby An — alongside her husband Noah (a history lover) and child psychologist Dr. Psyche — turns child-development science into 3-minute calming episodes. Course 02. No guilt. No racing the milestone clock.
channel.itunes:author: Ruby An

item.title: Episode 001: The Wired Differently (Part 1)
item.description: Some children experience the world at full volume. Episode 011 begins our neurodivergence series: spotting the difference between a tantrum and a sensory meltdown.
